title.en: Support Agent with LangGraph — Part 2 of 2: Tools Outside the RAG
title.es: Agente de Soporte con LangGraph — Parte 2 de 2: Herramientas Fuera del RAG

description.en: Extend your Part 1 LangGraph support agent with typed external tools: a required incident ticket lookup against your real incident manager API (timeout + honest fallback), optional inventory lookup, automatic routing between RAG and tools, traceable runs, and at least 2 new routing evals in tests/pipelines/.
description.es: Extiende tu agente de soporte LangGraph de la Parte 1 con tools externas tipadas: consulta obligatoria de tickets contra tu API real del gestor de incidentes (timeout + fallback honesto), consulta opcional de inventario, enrutamiento automático entre RAG y tools, corridas trazables y al menos 2 evals nuevos de enrutamiento en tests/pipelines/.

sharing.en: I just completed Support Agent with LangGraph — Part 2 of 2: Tools Outside the RAG with LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy.
